name: Oklahoma City
author: ryandicicco
description: Custom map of the Oklahoma City metro area featuring 378,004 buildings merged from five authoritative sources (Overture, OKC City Government 2020 aerial survey, FEMA/ORNL satellite imagery, Microsoft, and OpenStreetMap). High-quality LODES-based demand data with pre-calculated commute routes, airports (Will Rogers World / OKC), 7 universities, Tinker AFB military base, and entertainment venues (OKC Zoo, State Fair Park, Bricktown). Population ~1.1M covering the core metro plus surrounding areas.
